title: cercestis congensis
intro: Cercestis congensis, also known as Congo milkwood or African milkwood, is a species of evergreen tree native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits associated with Cercestis congensis include wound healing, pain relief, and the treatment of various infections and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the plant are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
